name: Slow-Cooker Bread
method: Preheat the slow cooker and line it with parchment paper.
Combine yeast and sugar in a large mixing basin. Stir in the
water until it is thoroughly mixed. Stir in the flour, olive oil, and
salt until everything is mixed and a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes on a lightly floured board
until smooth and soft. Cut a ball out from the dough and place it
in the slow cooker. Cook on high for 2 hours, or until golden on
the bottom and cooked through. (The interior temperature of the
bread should be around 200°, but the top will not be brown.)
Remove the bread from the slow cooker with care.
To crisp up the crust, place the bread on a baking pan and broil
for 2 to 3 minutes, or until golden. Allow for at least 20 minutes
Serve warm or at room temperature after slicing.
